gigaStakingMigration.title: GIGA staking migration
gigaStakingMigration.lead: You have <0>{{amount, number}} HDX</0> staked in Legacy Staking, you can maximize your staking rewards with GIGA HDX.
gigaStakingMigration.followUp: With one click of a button you can migrate Legacy HDX and start earning those rewards.

gigaStaking.banner.title: Maximize APR with GIGA HDX
gigaStaking.banner.description.migrate: Migrate your HDX Staking position to amplify your gains through borrowing with Hollar.
gigaStaking.banner.description.stake: HDX went GIGA - earn boosted HDX rewards and borrow HOLLAR
gigaStaking.claim.label: Voting rewards to claim
gigaStaking.claim.tooltip: Claims your voting reward shares from completed referenda and any already-credited pending rewards, compounded into your stake position in one transaction. Passive yield is already accruing automatically — no claim needed. To receive HDX in your wallet, you must unstake.
gigaStaking.claim.locked: +{{ value }} {{ symbol }} earned but currently locked under active conviction periods — claimable once those vote-locks expire.
gigaStaking.claim.toasts.success: Voting rewards claimed and compounded into your stake

gigaStaking.repay.error.repayLimit: You can't repay more than your borrowed amount.
gigaStaking.unstake.error.unstakeLimit: You can't unstake more than your safe unstake limit.
gigaHdxDescription.points: How can I benefit from it?
Choose how many HDX you wish to stake - these can be unstaked at any time.
Participate in governance to speed up the rate at which you can claim rewards.
gigaStaking.stake.gigaStakes: You have GIGAHDX staked, you can't stake more HDX.

gigaStaking.unstake.toasts.successWithRe: Giga unstaked {{ value, currency }}, claimed {{ rewardsValue, currency }} HDX in rewards

gigaStaking.cancelPendingPosition.confir: Are you sure you want to cancel unstaking position?
You’ll loose all unstaking progress and your position will go back to your GHDX Stake balance.
gigaStaking.position.principal.label: Principal
gigaStaking.position.accrued.label: Accrued yield
gigaStaking.realizeYield.tooltip: Move accrued yield into your locked principal. No cooldown. Required before voting to count your accrued HDX toward vote weight.
governance.title: Your voting power
governance.description: Vote with GIGAHDX or GIGAHDX+HDX. Not possible to vote with only HDX if you have GIGAHDX.
dashboard.title: Staking dashboard
dashboard.chart.legend.afterVoting.help: Your rewards will be updated when referenda which you voted for will be Approved or Rejected.
You have to vote max conviction with whole staking position.
dashboard.remainder2: Claiming resets your boost and forfeits
dashboard.remainder2.mobile: Claiming resets your boost and forfeits <0>{{ amount, number }} unclaimable {{ symbol }}</0> rewards.
dashboard.supplyStaked.title: {{ symbol }} Supply Staked
dashboard.projectedAPR.tooltip: Estimated from the last 60 days of reward activity.
Base APR is shared automatically by GIGAHDX holders.
Voting APR applies only when you vote and assumes Locked 6x conviction.
Actual rewards depend on your stake, conviction, and other voters.
howTo.title: How to stake?
howTo.points: You can easily get HDX by swapping from a range of assets on our <0>trade page.</0>
Choose how many HDX you wish to stake - these can be unstaked at any time.
Participate in governance to speed up the rate at which you can claim rewards.
Rewards can be claimed at any time - however, be aware that this could forfeit your unavailable portion.
stake.stake.minStakeError: Minimum value to stake is {{ amount }}
stake.stake.reserveCapError: Maximum value to stake is {{ amount }}
referenda.emptyState.description: Currently there are no ongoing referenda to vote in.
referenda.participate: Participate in governance to speed up the rate at which you can claim your staking rewards.
referenda.rewardPool.estimateTooltip: Upper bound — the pool is sized when the first voter removes their vote after the referendum ends. Multiple referenda share this pool: whichever allocates first takes its slice, and the rest see a smaller pot.
referenda.vote.modal.title: Referendum vote
referenda.vote.modal.lockDuration.descri: Your HDX/GIGAHDX will stay locked for entire voting period. After the vote ends, it remains locked for additional period based on your selected multiplier
referenda.vote.modal.multiplier.tooltip: Conviction multiplier — increases your vote weight in exchange for locking your tokens longer after the vote concludes. 0.1x means no lock but the vote only counts at 10% weight.
claim.header: Are you sure you want to claim rewards?
